# Resource Manager API, gRPC: ProjectService

Use this API to create, list, view, update, soft-delete, and undelete projects.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [GetProject](./get-project.md) | Returns a single project by its UUID. |
| [ListProjects](./list-projects.md) | Returns a paginated list of projects under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [CreateProject](./create-project.md) | Creates a new project under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [UpdateProject](./update-project.md) | Updates mutable fields of an existing project. |
| [DeleteProject](./delete-project.md) | Soft-deletes a project by its UUID. |
| [UndeleteProject](./undelete-project.md) | Restores a previously soft-deleted project. |
